rationale.oversight-scaling-inversion: Empirical evidence of reviewer burden and maintainer overload from AI slop.
rationale.quality-debt: Analyzes technical debt, code smells, and codebase degradation from AI code.
rationale.hitl-workflow: Documents practitioner review gates, PR size limits, and code walkthrough practices.
rationale.org-governance: Documents organizational accountability policies and mandates for AI-generated code.
